text: With respect to a TCP connection between a client and a server, which statement is true?

options.A: The client and server use a two-way handshake before data transmission
options.B: The server cannot initiate closing before the client initiates closing
options.D: The client and server can initiate closing at the same time

text: Which statement(s) is/are true about HTTP 1.1 interaction between browser and server?

options.A: HTTP 1.1 allows downloading multiple objects of the same webpage over the same TCP connection if stored on the same server
options.B: HTTP 1.1 allows downloading multiple objects of the same webpage over the same TCP connection even if stored on different servers
options.C: HTTP 1.1 allows sending a request for one object without waiting for a previous request to complete
options.D: HTTP 1.1 allows downloading multiple webpages on the same server over a single TCP connection

text: TCP sender establishes connection and starts transmission. Slow-start threshold = 10000 segments. RTT = 1 ms. No segment loss. Let t be the time (in ms) when transmission of segment 2000 starts. Which is correct?

Sliding window protocol over lossless link with window size W frames, each 1000 bits. Bandwidth = 100 kbps, one-way propagation delay = 100 ms. Processing and ACK transmission times are zero. Minimum W for 100% link utilization?
An ISP with address block 202.16.0.0/15 assigns 6000 IP addresses to a client using CIDR. Which block can be assigned?
